children.name: hide_hello_bar_for_members_of_specific_contact_lists
children.label: Hide Hello Bar for Members of Specific Contact Lists

children.name: excluded_list_ids
children.label: Excluded List IDs
children.help_text: Enter the ID of any number of contact lists. Members of at least one of these lists will not see the Hello Bar.

children.name: cookie_name_id
children.label: Cookie: Name/ID
children.help_text: Enter a unique alphanumeric combination of letters for use in the cookie name. This text should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores. No spaces or other special characters should be used. Changing the cookie name will cause any users with the old cookie(s) to immediately be able to see the popup again. This means the cookie name should only be changed when the Hello Bar's purpose is. The cookie is specific to domain.

children.name: cookie_lifetime_days_when_clicked
children.label: Cookie: Lifetime (Days) When Clicked
children.help_text: This cookie is only set if the CTA within the Hello Bar content is clicked.

name: logo_png
label: Logo [Color] (PNG)
help_text: Add both a PNG and SVG version of your logo. The SVG will be used when the browser supports it, otherwise the PNG is used as a fallback. For consistency, ensure both logos are visually identical.

name: logo_svg
label: Logo [Color] (SVG)
help_text: Add both a PNG and SVG version of your logo. The SVG will be used when the browser supports it, otherwise the PNG is used as a fallback. For consistency, ensure both logos are visually identical.

name: logo_white_png
label: Logo [White] (PNG)
help_text: Add both a PNG and SVG version of your logo. The SVG will be used when the browser supports it, otherwise the PNG is used as a fallback. For consistency, ensure both logos are visually identical.

name: logo_white_svg

children.name: add_a_hyperlink
children.label: Add a Hyperlink to this Menu Link

children.name: mobile_menu_label
children.label: Mobile Menu Label
children.inline_help_text: If this link has a child menu nested within it, in the mobile menu a separate menu link is needed to allow users to reach the URL since the click functionality is overridden. You may add label text here which will be used for that link or leave this blank to use the same label as on desktop.

children.name: mega_menu_groups
children.label: Mega Menu: Groups
children.inline_help_text: You may add up to 5 groups of megamenu links.

children.name: mega_menu_group_width
children.label: Mega Menu: Group Width
children.inline_help_text: Ensure the total group width of columns in your mega menu add up to exactly 100%, otherwise there may be extra white space or your columns may not fit in the available space.

children.name: mega_menu_group_background_color
children.label: Mega Menu: Group Background Color
children.inline_help_text: Ensure the total group width of columns in your mega menu add up to exactly 100%, otherwise there may be extra white space or your columns may not fit in the available space.
